title: Senior Software Engineer - SigTuple South Asia Partners - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - SigTuple South Asia Partners - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Join the SigTuple South Asia Partners family as a Senior Software Engineer in Jodhpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About SigTuple South Asia Partners:
SigTuple South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SigTuple South Asia Partners!
